title: Smart Data Models - EnergyCommunity
description: A collective entity representing an energy community enabling shared production, consumption, and storage of energy among its members.

type.description: NGSI-LD entity type. It must be EnergyCommunity.

communityType.description: Type of energy community (e.g., Renewable Energy Community, Citizen Energy Community).

regulatoryFramework.description: Regulatory or legal framework governing the energy community.

hasMember.description: Energy prosumers participating in the energy community.

aggregates.description: Energy assets aggregated, owned, or managed at community level.

aggregatesConsumption.description: Aggregated energy consumption of the energy community.

aggregatesProduction.description: Aggregated energy production of the energy community.

usesWeatherForecast.description: Weather forecast entity used by the energy community.
